approvals.intent: Install the Grafana operator in namespace grafana. Add a wait after creating the namespace to ensure it's ready before creating the OperatorGroup.

warnings.message: Consider adding 'gather_facts: false' for localhost plays
No tags defined — consider adding tags for selective execution

approvals.yaml_content:
---
- name: Install Grafana operator in grafana namespace
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local
  tasks:
    - name: Create grafana namespace
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        name: grafana
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        state: present

    - name: Wait for namespace to be ready
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        name: grafana
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Active
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 60

    - name: Create OperatorGroup for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1
          kind: OperatorGroup
          metadata:
            name: grafana-operator-group
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            targetNamespaces:
              - grafana
        state: present

    - name: Create Subscription for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
          kind: Subscription
          metadata:
            name: grafana-operator
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            channel: v5
            name: grafana-operator
            source: community-operators
            sourceNamespace: openshift-marketplace
        state: present

    - name: Wait for Grafana operator to be installed
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
        kind: ClusterServiceVersion
        namespace: grafana
        label_selectors:
          - "operators.coreos.com/grafana-operator.grafana"
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Succeeded
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 300

    - name: Verify Grafana operator deployment is ready
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: apps/v1
        kind: Deployment
        namespace: grafana
        label_selectors:
          - "control-plane=controller-manager"
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Available
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 180

approvals.intent: Install the Grafana operator in namespace grafana. Add a wait after creating the namespace to ensure it's ready before creating the OperatorGroup.

warnings.message: No tags defined — consider adding tags for selective execution

approvals.yaml_content:
---
- name: Install Grafana operator in grafana namespace
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local
  gather_facts: false
  tasks:
    - name: Create grafana namespace
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        name: grafana
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        state: present

    - name: Wait for grafana namespace to be ready
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        name: grafana
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Ready
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 60

    - name: Create OperatorGroup for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1
          kind: OperatorGroup
          metadata:
            name: grafana-operatorgroup
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            targetNamespaces:
              - grafana
        state: present
      register: operatorgroup_result

    - name: Create Subscription for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
          kind: Subscription
          metadata:
            name: grafana-operator
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            channel: v4
            name: grafana-operator
            source: community-operators
            sourceNamespace: openshift-marketplace
        state: present
      register: subscription_result

    - name: Wait for Grafana operator to be installed
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: apps/v1
        kind: Deployment
        namespace: grafana
        label_selectors:
          - "app.kubernetes.io/name=grafana-operator"
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Available
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 300

    - name: Verify operator installation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
        kind: ClusterServiceVersion
        namespace: grafana
        label_selectors:
          - "operators.coreos.com/grafana-operator.grafana"
      register: csv_check

    - name: Display operator status
      debug:
        msg: "Grafana operator installed successfully"
      when: csv_check.resources | length > 0

approvals.yaml_content:
---
- name: Install Grafana operator in grafana namespace
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local
  tasks:
    - name: Create grafana namespace
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        name: grafana
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        state: present

    - name: Wait for namespace to be ready
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        name: grafana
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Active
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 60

    - name: Create OperatorGroup for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1
          kind: OperatorGroup
          metadata:
            name: grafana-operator-group
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            targetNamespaces:
              - grafana
        state: present

    - name: Create Subscription for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
          kind: Subscription
          metadata:
            name: grafana-operator
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            channel: v4
            name: grafana-operator
            source: community-operators
            sourceNamespace: openshift-marketplace
        state: present

    - name: Wait for Grafana operator to be installed
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
        kind: ClusterServiceVersion
        namespace: grafana
        label_selectors:
          - "operators.coreos.com/grafana-operator.grafana"
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Succeeded
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 300

    - name: Verify Grafana operator deployment
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: apps/v1
        kind: Deployment
        namespace: grafana
        label_selectors:
          - "app.kubernetes.io/name=grafana-operator"
      register: grafana_operator_deployment

    - name: Confirm operator is running
      ansible.builtin.assert:
        that:
          - grafana_operator_deployment.resources | length > 0
          - grafana_operator_deployment.resources[0].status.readyReplicas | default(0) > 0
        fail_msg: "Grafana operator deployment is not ready"
        success_msg: "Grafana operator is successfully installed and running"

approvals.intent: Create a Helm-based deployment of cert-manager from the Jetstack Helm repo

warnings.message: No tags defined — consider adding tags for selective execution

approvals.yaml_content:
---
- name: Deploy cert-manager using Helm
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local
  gather_facts: false
  
  tasks:
    - name: Add Jetstack Helm repository
      kubernetes.core.helm_repository:
        name: jetstack
        repo_url: https://charts.jetstack.io
        state: present

    - name: Update Helm repository cache
      kubernetes.core.helm_repository:
        name: jetstack
        repo_url: https://charts.jetstack.io
        force_update: true

    - name: Create cert-manager namespace
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        name: cert-manager
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        state: present

    - name: Deploy cert-manager using Helm
      kubernetes.core.helm:
        name: cert-manager
        chart_ref: jetstack/cert-manager
        release_namespace: cert-manager
        create_namespace: false
        values:
          installCRDs: true
        state: present
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Ready
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 600
      register: cert_manager_deployment

    - name: Verify cert-manager pods are running
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Pod
        namespace: cert-manager
        label_selectors:
          - app.kubernetes.io/instance=cert-manager
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Ready
          status: "True"
        wait_sleep: 10
        wait_timeout: 300

    - name: Verify cert-manager CRDs are installed
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1
        kind: CustomResourceDefinition
        name: certificates.cert-manager.io
      register: cert_crd_check

    - name: Confirm cert-manager deployment success
      debug:
        msg: "cert-manager successfully deployed in namespace cert-manager"
      when: cert_crd_check.resources | length > 0

approvals.intent: Install the Grafana operator from OperatorHub in namespace grafana, create a Grafana instance, and configure a datasource pointing to OpenShift Prometheus at https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091

warnings.message: No tags defined — consider adding tags for selective execution

approvals.yaml_content:
---
- name: Install Grafana Operator and Configure Instance
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local
  gather_facts: false
  tasks:

    - name: Create grafana namespace
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        name: grafana
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        state: present

    - name: Create OperatorGroup for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1
          kind: OperatorGroup
          metadata:
            name: grafana-operator-group
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            targetNamespaces:
              - grafana
        state: present

    - name: Create Subscription for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
          kind: Subscription
          metadata:
            name: grafana-operator
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            channel: v4
            name: grafana-operator
            source: community-operators
            sourceNamespace: openshift-marketplace
        state: present

    - name: Wait for Grafana operator to be ready
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: apps/v1
        kind: Deployment
        name: grafana-operator-controller-manager
        namespace: grafana
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Available
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 300

    - name: Create Grafana instance
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: integreatly.org/v1alpha1
          kind: Grafana
          metadata:
            name: grafana-instance
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            config:
              auth:
                disable_login_form: false
              security:
                admin_user: admin
                admin_password: admin123
            dashboardLabelSelector:
              - matchExpressions:
                  - key: app
                    operator: In
                    values:
                      - grafana
        state: present

    - name: Wait for Grafana instance to be ready
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: integreatly.org/v1alpha1
        kind: Grafana
        name: grafana-instance
        namespace: grafana
        wait: true
        wait_condition:
          type: Ready
          status: "True"
        wait_timeout: 300

    - name: Create Prometheus datasource
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        definition:
          apiVersion: integreatly.org/v1alpha1
          kind: GrafanaDataSource
          metadata:
            name: prometheus-datasource
            namespace: grafana
          spec:
            grafana:
              name: grafana-instance
              namespace: grafana
            datasources:
              - name: Prometheus
                type: prometheus
                url: https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091
                access: proxy
                isDefault: true
                jsonData:
                  httpHeaderName1: Authorization
                secureJsonData:
                  httpHeaderValue1: Bearer
        state: present

    - name: Verify Grafana datasource creation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: integreatly.org/v1alpha1
        kind: GrafanaDataSource
        name: prometheus-datasource
        namespace: grafana
      register: datasource_status

    - name: Display Grafana service information
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Service
        namespace: grafana
        label_selectors:
          - app=grafana
      register: grafana_service

approvals.intent: Install the Grafana operator from OperatorHub in namespace grafana, create a Grafana instance, and configure a datasource pointing to the OpenShift built-in Prometheus at https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091

issues.message:
Invalid YAML: mapping values are not allowed here
  in "<unicode string>", line 120, column 103:
     ... _yaml('datasources') == [{'name': 'Prometheus', 'type': 'prometh ...

warnings.message: No tags defined — consider adding tags for selective execution

approvals.yaml_content:
---
- name: Install Grafana Operator
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local
  gather_facts: no
  tasks:
    - name: Create namespace for Grafana operator
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        metadata:
          name: grafana
      register: namespace

    - name: Validate namespace creation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        fieldselector:
          metadata.name: grafana
      register: validate_namespace
      until: namespace.metadata.name == 'grafana'
      retries: 5
      delay: 5

    - name: Create Grafana operator deployment
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        api_version: apps/v1
        kind: Deployment
        metadata:
          namespace: grafana
          name: grafana-operator
        spec:
          replicas: 1
          selector:
            matchLabels:
              app: grafana-operator
          template:
            metadata:
              labels:
                app: grafana-operator
            spec:
              containers:
              - name: operator
                image: grafana/operator:v5.3.2
                args:
                - install

    - name: Validate deployment creation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: apps/v1
        kind: Deployment
        fieldselector:
          metadata.name: grafana-operator
          namespace: grafana
      register: validate_deployment
      until: validate_deployment.items[0].status.availableReplicas == 1
      retries: 5
      delay: 5

    - name: Create Grafana instance
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        api_version: apps/v1
        kind: Deployment
        metadata:
          namespace: grafana
          name: grafana
        spec:
          replicas: 1
          selector:
            matchLabels:
              app: grafana
          template:
            metadata:
              labels:
                app: grafana
            spec:
              containers:
              - name: server
                image: grafana/grafana:v6.0.4
                args:
                - --infra-prometheus.url=https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091

    - name: Validate instance creation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: apps/v1
        kind: Deployment
        fieldselector:
          metadata.name: grafana
          namespace: grafana
      register: validate_instance
      until: validate_instance.items[0].status.availableReplicas == 1
      retries: 5
      delay: 5

    - name: Create datasource for Grafana
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        api_version: v1
        kind: ConfigMap
        metadata:
          namespace: grafana
          name: grafana-datasource
        data:
          datasources.yaml: |
            apiVersion: 1
            datasources:
            - name: Prometheus
              type: prometheus
              url: https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091
              isDefault: true

    - name: Validate datasource creation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: v1
        kind: ConfigMap
        fieldselector:
          metadata.name: grafana-datasource
          namespace: grafana
      register: validate_datasource
      until: validate_datasource.items[0].data.datasources.yaml | from_yaml('datasources') == [{'name': 'Prometheus', 'type': 'prometheus', 'url': 'https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091'}]
      retries: 5
      delay: 5

approvals.intent: Create a namespace called arnie-test with resource quotas

warnings.message: Consider adding 'gather_facts: false' for localhost plays
No tags defined — consider adding tags for selective execution

approvals.yaml_content:
---
- name: Create arnie-test Namespace with Resource Quotas
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local

  tasks:
  - name: Create Namespace
    kubernetes.core.k8s:
      api_version: v1
      kind: Namespace
      metadata:
        name: arnie-test
      state: present

  - name: Create CPU Resource Quota
    kubernetes.core.k8s:
      api_version: policy/v1beta1
      kind: ResourceQuota
      metadata:
        namespace: arnie-test
        name: cpu-quota
      spec:
        hard:
          cpu: '2'
      state: present

  - name: Create Memory Resource Quota
    kubernetes.core.k8s:
      api_version: policy/v1beta1
      kind: ResourceQuota
      metadata:
        namespace: arnie-test
        name: memory-quota
      spec:
        hard:
          memory: '2Gi'
      state: present

  - name: Validate Namespace and Resource Quotas existence
    kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
      api_version: v1
      kind: Namespace
      metadata:
        name: arnie-test
      register: namespace

    kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
      api_version: policy/v1beta1
      kind: ResourceQuota
      metadata:
        namespace: arnie-test
        name: cpu-quota
      register: cpu_quota

    kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
      api_version: policy/v1beta1
      kind: ResourceQuota
      metadata:
        namespace: arnie-test
        name: memory-quota
      register: memory_quota

  - name: Fail on errors
    assert:
      that:
        - namespace is defined
        - cpu_quota is defined
        - memory_quota is defined

approvals.intent: Create a namespace called staging with resource quotas and network policies

warnings.message: Consider adding 'gather_facts: false' for localhost plays
No tags defined — consider adding tags for selective execution

approvals.yaml_content:
---
- name: Create Staging Namespace with Resource Quotas and Network Policies
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local

  tasks:
    - name: Create Namespace
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        namespace: staging
        state: present

    - name: Create Resource Quota for Staging Namespace
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        api_version: policy/v1beta1
        kind: ResourceQuota
        namespace: staging
        metadata:
          name: staging-quota
        spec:
          hard:
            pods: "10"
            services: "5"

    - name: Create Network Policy for Staging Namespace
      kubernetes.core.k8s:
        api_version: networking.k8s.io/v1
        kind: NetworkPolicy
        namespace: staging
        metadata:
          name: allow-traffic-from-internet
        spec:
          podSelector: {}
          policyTypes:
            - Ingress

    - name: Validate Namespace Creation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: v1
        kind: Namespace
        namespace: staging
      register: namespace

    - debug:
        msg: "Namespace {{ namespace.namespace }} created"

    - name: Validate Resource Quota Creation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: policy/v1beta1
        kind: ResourceQuota
        namespace: staging
        metadata:
          name: staging-quota
      register: quota

    - debug:
        msg: "Resource Quota {{ quota.kind }} created"

    - name: Validate Network Policy Creation
      kubernetes.core.k8s_info:
        api_version: networking.k8s.io/v1
        kind: NetworkPolicy
        namespace: staging
        metadata:
          name: allow-traffic-from-internet
      register: networkpolicy

    - debug:
        msg: "Network Policy {{ networkpolicy.kind }} created"
